        (value && value.split(':')[1]) || ''
    );
    //
    const handleHourChange = (e: React.ChangeEvent<HTMLInputElement>) => {
        setLocalH(e.target.value.replace(/[^0-9]/g, '').slice(0, 2));
    };

    const handleMinuteChange = (e: React.ChangeEvent<HTMLInputElement>) => {
        setLocalM(e.target.value.replace(/[^0-9]/g, '').slice(0, 2));
    };
    const updateTime = (newH: string, newM: string) => {
        onChange(`${newH}:${newM}`);
    };
    const handleHourBlur = (e: React.FocusEvent<HTMLInputElement>) => {
        const newValue = e.target.value;
        const parsed = parseInt(newValue, 10);
        const clamped = Math.max(0, Math.min(23, parsed));
        if (parsed === clamped) {
            setLocalH(newValue);
        } else {
            setLocalH(String(clamped).padStart(2, '0'));
        }
    };
    const handleMinuteBlur = (e: React.FocusEvent<HTMLInputElement>) => {
        const newValue = e.target.value;
        const parsed = parseInt(newValue, 10);
        const clamped = Math.max(0, Math.min(59, parsed));
        if (parsed === clamped) {
            setLocalM(newValue);
        } else {
            setLocalM(String(clamped).padStart(2, '0'));
        }
    };
    useEffect(() => {
        const parts = value.split(':');
        const h = parts[0];
        const m = parts[1];
        setLocalH(h || '');
        setLocalM(m || '');
    }, [value]);
    return (
        <div>
            <input
                type="number"
                value={localH}
                onChange={handleHourChange}
                onBlur={handleHourBlur}
            />
            :
            <input
                type="number"
                value={localM}
                onChange={handleMinuteChange}
                onBlur={handleMinuteBlur}
            />
        </div>
    );
};
